core_mechanism: closed-form estimation of the cumulative output of a supercritical branching/chain-reaction process: exponential runaway multiplication above a critical threshold that self-terminates via a negative feedback (the medium expanding/disassembling back below criticality), with the total yield given by the time-integral of the exponentially growing reaction rate up to the self-quenching point
brief_reason: The abstract concerns competing 'yield formulas' that estimate the explosive output of a fission chain reaction, and such a yield is set by runaway exponential multiplication above a critical threshold that is halted when the multiplying medium disassembles below criticality.
